month_specific_notes.August: Expect hot weather. Carry sun protection and plan indoor activities in the afternoon.
month_specific_notes.December: Peak season. Apply early because hotel and flight confirmations may take longer.

important_notices: Passport must be valid for 6 months
Visa rules can change without notice

month_specific_notes.July: Summer demand is high. Book appointment slots as early as possible.
month_specific_notes.September: Shoulder season is smoother, but embassy slots may still be limited.

important_notices: Submit to the country of longest stay
Insurance must cover at least EUR 30,000

month_specific_notes.April: Cherry blossom season has high hotel demand.
month_specific_notes.October: Autumn foliage season needs advance planning.
